title: elatine californica
intro: Elatine californica, also known as California waterwort, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Elatinaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elatine californica include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as a diuretic and a laxative. Herbal preparations of Elatine californica can be made from its leaves and roots, which are typically dried and infused in hot water or used as a tincture to reap its medicinal benefits.
